text: The user must complete registration within 30 seconds.
Admin should configure email alerts for critical events.
Customers expect reliable order tracking in real time.
The system should encrypt data at rest and in transit.
Developers need access to debugging tools during testing.
Users must be able to recover deleted files within 24 hours.
It is urgent to resolve the login timeout issue.
Managers need performant report generation for quarterly reviews.
Students should submit assignments through the web portal.
The API must return paginated results under 500 milliseconds.
